columns.name: TPID
columns.description: Identifier for the batch or process

columns.name: LOSSE_STED
columns.description: Location where discharge is to take place

columns.description: Identifier for the plan or schedule

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Current status of the plan or process

columns.name: OVERF_VEKTSYSTEM
columns.description: Indicator for the weighting system used

columns.name: SORTERING
columns.description: Order or sequence in which items are sorted
